text.div: Exception generating Narrative: Unable to Parse HTML - node 'code' has unexpected content ' ' (last text = ' /* * Library: IMMZD2DTMalariaElements */ library IMMZD2DTMalariaElements using FHIR version '4.0.1' include FHIRHelpers version '4.0.1' include WHOConcepts include WHOCommon called WC include WHOElements called WE include IMMZCommon called Common include IMMZConcepts called Concepts include IMMZElements called Elements context Patient /* @internal: Malaria containing Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Malaria Doses Administered to Patient": Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Malaria vaccines" /* @internal: Malaria containing Doses Administered to Patient that are in the Primary series */ define "Malaria Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient": "Malaria Doses Administered to Patient".seriesPrimary() /* @internal: Number of Malaria Primary Series doses */ define "Number of Malaria Primary Series Doses Administered": Count("Malaria Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient") /* @input: Client's age is less than 5 months @pseudocode: Today's date − "Date of birth" ' at line 238 column 46

name: IMMZD2DTMalariaElements
title: IMMZD2DTMalariaElements
description: This library defines context-independent elements for Malaria used throughout the Immunization CPG

parameter.name: Malaria Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Malaria Primary Series Doses Administered
Client's age is less than 5 months
No malaria primary series doses were administered
Client's age is more than or equal to 5 months
One malaria primary series dose was administered
The latest malaria dose was administered less than 4 weeks ago
The latest malaria dose was administered more than 4 weeks ago
Two malaria primary series doses were administered
Three malaria primary series doses were administered
Four malaria primary series doses were administered
